name: Recommendation must explicitly choose one project or many
query: Please audit our monorepo setup for Chromatic best practices.
context: The user describes multiple apps, two Storybooks, and separate team ownership but does not explicitly ask whether to split projects.
expected_behavior: Makes an explicit topology decision anyway
Uses ownership and review-surface facts to justify the decision
Returns concrete next-step snippets rather than a generic checklist
success_criteria: The response never stops at vague best practices
The response includes a decision plus implementation guidance
